rulings.Case Title: IN RE:BROWN, MONZIONE, FABBRO, ZAKARIA &
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreemtnt Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 And Request For Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY SEPTEMBER 29, 2006. PETITIONER PAUL M. MONZIONE'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PURSUANT TO C C P 664.6 AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES, THE MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT UNDER C C P 664.6 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COURT NEEDS COPY OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT TO ENFORCE. MOVANT MAY REFILE AND COMPLY WITH SEALING PROCEDURE OF C R C 243.12 AND C R C 243.2 =(302AJR/PB)
